parameters.specification/query:
DEFINE
    VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
        FILTER(
            KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('NGBA Defects'[Defect Status])),
            NOT('NGBA Defects'[Defect Status] IN {"Confirmed", "Withdrawn"})
        )

    VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
        FILTER(
            KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('NGBA Test Cases'[Real Status])),
            'NGBA Test Cases'[Real Status] <> "Error"
        )

    VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
        FILTER(
            KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category])),
            NOT('NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category] IN {"Authorization"})
        )

    VAR __DS0FilterTable4 = 
        TREATAS({"GB"}, 'NGBA Test Cases'[Business Unit])

    VAR __DS0Core = 
        SELECTCOLUMNS(
            KEEPFILTERS(
                FILTER(
                    KEEPFILTERS(
                        SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
                            'NGBA Test Cases'[Test Case Description],
                            'NGBA Test Cases'[Test_Plan],
                            'NGBA Test Cases'[Test Package ID],
                            'NGBA Test Cases'[Testcase Display URL],
                            'NGBA Test Cases'[Real Status],
                            'Priority Table'[Priority],
                            'Priority Table'[Value],
                            'NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category],
                            'NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed On Text],
                            'NGBA Test Cases'[Open Defects],
                            'NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed By],
                            __DS0FilterTable,
                            __DS0FilterTable2,
                            __DS0FilterTable3,
                            __DS0FilterTable4,
                            "CountRowsNGBA_Test_Cases", COUNTROWS('NGBA Test Cases'),
                            "CountRowsNGBA_Defects", COUNTROWS('NGBA Defects')
                        )
                    ),
                    OR(
                        OR(
                            OR(
                                OR(
                                    OR(
                                        OR(
                                            OR(
                                                OR(
                                                    OR(
                                                        OR(
                                                            NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Test Cases'[Test Case Description])),
                                                            NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Test Cases'[Test_Plan]))
                                                        ),
                                                        NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Test Cases'[Test Package ID]))
                                                    ),
                                                    NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Test Cases'[Testcase Display URL]))
                                                ),
                                                NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Test Cases'[Real Status]))
                                            ),
                                            NOT(ISBLANK('Priority Table'[Priority]))
                                        ),
                                        NOT(ISBLANK('Priority Table'[Value]))
                                    ),
                                    NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category]))
                                ),
                                NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed On Text]))
                            ),
                            NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Test Cases'[Open Defects]))
                        ),
                        NOT(ISBLANK('NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed By]))
                    )
                )
            ),
            "'NGBA Test Cases'[Test Case Description]", 'NGBA Test Cases'[Test Case Description],
            "'NGBA Test Cases'[Test_Plan]", 'NGBA Test Cases'[Test_Plan],
            "'NGBA Test Cases'[Test Package ID]", 'NGBA Test Cases'[Test Package ID],
            "'NGBA Test Cases'[Testcase Display URL]", 'NGBA Test Cases'[Testcase Display URL],
            "'NGBA Test Cases'[Real Status]", 'NGBA Test Cases'[Real Status],
            "'Priority Table'[Priority]", 'Priority Table'[Priority],
            "'Priority Table'[Value]", 'Priority Table'[Value],
            "'NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category]", 'NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category],
            "'NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed On Text]", 'NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed On Text],
            "'NGBA Test Cases'[Open Defects]", 'NGBA Test Cases'[Open Defects],
            "'NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed By]", 'NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed By]
        )

    VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = __DS0Core

EVALUATE
    __DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
    'NGBA Test Cases'[Test Case Description],
    'NGBA Test Cases'[Test_Plan],
    'NGBA Test Cases'[Test Package ID],
    'NGBA Test Cases'[Testcase Display URL],
    'NGBA Test Cases'[Real Status],
    'Priority Table'[Value],
    'Priority Table'[Priority],
    'NGBA Defects'[Defect Multi-Level Category],
    'NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed On Text],
    'NGBA Test Cases'[Open Defects],
    'NGBA Test Cases'[Overall Changed By]

required: NGBA Test Cases[Overall Changed On Text]
